title: Kode Rahasia Kotak Resi
theme: Melalui sebuah teka-teki kecil, seorang kasir belajar mengatasi kecemasan masa lalu dan menemukan optimisme dalam hal-hal tak terduga.

cover.prompt: Exterior view of a 24-hour convenience store at deep night hours. Vibrant neon signs cast a brilliant glow across the scene, creating strong contrasts. The building stands on a tranquil roadside pathway. A solitary figure is subtly visible inside, a silhouette against the luminous interior, positioned near the service counter. A pervasive sense of quiet unease permeates the setting, evocative of an invisible, subtle frost beginning to emerge. Focus on environmental details and mood.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, cool and contrasting color tones, rule of thirds composition

meta.plan_summary: Anya, a new cashier, unravels a mysterious series of codes left by an old customer in a quiet minimarket. Initially fearing a threat, she ultimately discovers a whimsical game that helps her overcome past anxieties and embrace unexpected optimism, deciding to continue the playful tradition.
meta.target_emotion: Kelegaan, optimisme, dan rasa senang karena menemukan hal baik tak terduga setelah mengatasi kecemasan.
